name: agentmail
tagline: ClawHub (66★): API-first email platform designed for AI agents. Create and manage dedicated email inboxes, send and receive emails programm
verdict: The skill oversteps its own billing: pitched as an email API wrapper, but the body also has it writing a new global config file and installing extra software, a scope-creep risk agents won't expect from the description alone. Its external setup flow has no failure handling either.

highlights.summary: Description promises an email API wrapper (inboxes, send/receive, webhooks) but the body also instructs writing a new global config file (~/.clawdbot/clawdbot.json), installing a h
The multi-step external-dependency flow (account/API-key setup, SDK install, inbox creation, sending, webhook registration) has no mention anywhere of what to do if a step fails —
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body.
